mapper.insert: INSERT INTO songs (title, artist, file_path, cover_path, duration, style, mood, is_public, uploader_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{artist}, #{filePath}, #{coverPath}, #{duration}, #{style}, #{mood}, #{isPublic}, #{uploaderId})
mapper.update: UPDATE songs SET play_count = play_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE songs SET cover_path = #{coverPath} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE songs SET video_path = #{videoPath} WHERE id = #{id}
